infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: This app needs your location to provide truck route navigation, find nearby docks, and alert you to road hazards.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: This app uses your location in the background to provide turn-by-turn navigation and real-time hazard alerts while driving.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app needs your location to show your position on the map, calculate routes, and find nearby docks.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: This app needs your location to provide truck route navigation, find nearby docks, and alert you to road hazards.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: This app uses your location in the background to provide turn-by-turn navigation and real-time hazard alerts while driving.
